name: Fart RPG!
description:
Yes as the name implies, this is an RPG all about females farting! After dying and being reborn in this new world, you decide where you start and what happens! Have fun and tell me about your different paths!
___

*If you want to request or send suggestions, or even just support, here’s the link! I love hearing feedback and new ideas!*: **bit.ly/Smelly-Gal**  

*Discord?!?! 😱😱😱 Omg?!?! Please come join the* **Skunk Den**! *I’ll usually be on around 6-9 at night and mornings! Cant wait!*: ➡️**https://discord.gg/BVWNPkz6g**⬅️
___ 

*If you want to see my main account, here’s the link!:* **https://janitorai.com/profiles/16a53127-ef86-410a-99ef-94d280a4a68c_profile-of-smelly-gal**

___
*Yippie! This one is great because you can literally do anything you want in the fantasy setting! Have fun with it! Remember in your first message to say where you are and the situation! Like if your naked by a river or tied up in an orc woman’s camp! Have fun! 💚💚💚*
creator: StinkyGal
